overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy gliding down through foggy night skies into a dense jungle using a glowing blue Shieldwing, then exploring on foot toward a rebel camp marked by corrupted red vegetation. The clip transitions from aerial descent to ground-level stealth exploration with a distinctive teal-green color palette.

events.description: UI notification appears: Discovered Rebel Camp FENRISSE
character slows descent and prepares for landing in the forest clearing

agents.ego_description: gliding downward using the glowing blue Shieldwing glider toward the rebel camp lights visible through the canopy

entered.detail: large glowing blue energy glider deployed on character's back with translucent wing surfaces
dense green treetops covering the ground below with mist rising between trees
distant mountain silhouettes visible on the horizon against dark clouds
warm orange lanterns and fires glowing through the trees indicating the camp location

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial night view as Aloy descends through foggy skies using her glowing Shieldwing glider. The camera follows from behind, showing the expansive forest canopy below with distant mountains and the warm lights of the rebel camp twinkling through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: rebel camp perimeter with wooden fortifications

events.description: character lands on the ground and stows the glider, transitioning from aerial to ground movement
quest UI appears: New Rebel Camp FENRISSE with option to open discovery menu

agents.ego_description: landing softly on the forest floor and beginning to explore the camp perimeter, observing the wooden structures

entered.detail: rough wooden palisade fence marking the boundary of the rebel camp
burning campfire with bright orange flames illuminating nearby trees
elevated wooden structure built into the trees with ladders

segments.scene_description: Aloy lands in a clearing at the camp's edge, the glider folding away as she transitions to foot exploration. The scene shows wooden fortifications and a burning campfire nearby, with UI elements indicating the discovery of the rebel camp location.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense jungle interior with thick undergrowth and ancient ruins

events.description: UI notification: Discovered CAMPFIRE location marked on the map
character breaks into a run while navigating around trees and overgrowth

agents.ego_description: moving stealthily through the dense jungle undergrowth, scanning for enemies and navigating around large trees

entered.detail: massive tree trunks with rough bark rising high into the canopy
dense clusters of large ferns covering the forest floor
decaying logs lying across the path

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the dark jungle interior, surrounded by massive tree trunks and dense fern undergrowth. The lighting is dim and green-tinted, with mist drifting between the trees as the character navigates the narrow paths and discovers a campfire location.

scene_state.functional_zone: rebel camp interior with corrupted red vegetation and ancient ruins

events.description: entering area with tall red glowing grass indicating corrupted or rebel-touched vegetation
ambient lighting shifts to red-orange glow emanating from the corrupted plants and fireflies

agents.ego_description: cautiously approaching the red-tinted camp area with weapon ready, observing the corrupted environment

entered.detail: tall grass glowing with orange-red light and swarming with fireflies
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky
ancient stone structures overgrown with vegetation

segments.scene_description: The jungle opens into a clearing dominated by eerie red glowing grass and fireflies, marking the rebel camp's corrupted zone. Ancient stone ruins and palm trees become visible as the character approaches the objective, with the lighting shifting to an ominous red-orange hue.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a high-altitude night descent through foggy skies into the ominous, corrupted depths of a jungle camp. It begins with an aerial view following Aloy as she glides on a glowing blue Shieldwing, descending through mist toward a distant forest canopy and twinkling camp lights. As she lands in a clearing, the camera transitions to a ground-level perspective, moving past wooden fortifications and a burning campfire. The scene then shifts deeper into the dark jungle interior, navigating through massive tree trunks and dim, green-tinted mist before the terrain opens into a clearing of eerie red glowing grass. Finally, the lighting transforms into an ominous red-orange hue as the camera approaches ancient stone ruins and palm trees within the corrupted zone.
